ddls:
CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "school_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school type */,
  "total_students" INTEGER /* Total number of students enrolled */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget allocated to the school */,
  "per_student_budget" REAL /* Budget allocated per student */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the school was founded */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "address" TEXT /* School address */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the school is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the school is located */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Zip code of the school */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schools_school_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_type_id") REFERENCES school_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "school_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the school type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the school type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "average_math_score" REAL /* Average math score of students */,
  "average_reading_score" REAL /* Average reading score of students */,
  "passing_math_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students passing math */,
  "passing_reading_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students passing reading */,
  "overall_passing_rate" REAL /* Overall passing rate of students */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the metrics were recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Full name of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the school */,
  "grade_level" INTEGER /* Grade level of the student */,
  "student_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "parent_email" TEXT /* Email address of the student's parent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_students_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year for the budget */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount of money allocated */,
  "approved_amount" REAL /* Approved budget amount */,
  "actual_spend" REAL /* Actual amount spent */,
  "budget_category" TEXT /* Category of the budget (e.g., Salaries, Materials, etc.) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each score entry */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the student */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the score (e.g., Math, Reading) */,
  "score" REAL /* Score achieved by the student */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the score was recorded */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester the score was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_scores_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "passing_rates" (
  "rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each passing rate entry */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the passing rate (e.g., Math, Reading) */,
  "passing_rate" REAL /* Percentage of students passing the subject */,
  "year" TEXT /* Year the passing rate was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_passing_rates_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, data analyst, school principal) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the school */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "data_viewed" TEXT /* Description of the data viewed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the budget category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the budget category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budget_breakdown" (
  "breakdown_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget breakdown entry */,
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the budget category */,
  "allocated_amount" REAL /* Amount allocated to the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("breakdown_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_breakdown_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES budget_categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budget_breakdown_budget_id FOREIGN KEY ("budget_id") REFERENCES budgets ("budget_id")
)
